omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • Analysis and Improvement of Services (Non-personal Information). When you use our services, in order to help us provide you with more useful information, understand which parts of our website, products, and services you are most interested in, and improve the services we offer to you, we may also collect other information that cannot be used to identify a specific individual (i.e., information that does not fall within the category of personal information). For example, we may collect aggregated statistical data generated when you use specific services, such as users' operation behaviors (including clicks, page jumps, browsing time, and function usage). The categories and quantity of the collected information depend on how you use our products and/or services. We use such information in an aggregated form to enhance your experience when using our application. For the purposes of this privacy policy, aggregated data is considered non-personal information and cannot be used to identify your identity.If we combine non-personal information with personal information, during the period of combined use, such information will be regarded as personal information, and we will use this information in strict compliance with this privacy policy.

10. Third-party SDK name: OPPO PUSH
Information collection types: Device-related information (such as IMEI [targeting at the following versions of Android Q], Android ID), application list
Purpose of use: It is used to provide the message pushing service for the mobile terminal of OPPO brand
Operating systems: Android

• Feedback information. We may collect the feedback information that you provide, including feedback content (including product usage or quality problems), router model, basic contact information and error logs.

If you need us to send invoices related to Software Value-Added Services, you also need to
provide us with the consignee's name, address, telephone number, fax number and email
address for receiving the invoice.

• The Information collected related to the Software Value-Added Services (Including but not
limited to: camera cloud storage, log cloud storage) provided by our organization encompasses
the following data points:
Account information, device ID, package type, service validity period and days, order number,
payment time, payment amount, payment currency, activation status, renewal amount,
renewal date, payment method.

• Location information (We do not use or collect your precise geographic location unless
your separate consent is sought).We may collect the following location information of the
device(s) on which you installed Aqara Home: region, country code, city code, mobile network
code, mobile country code, cell identity, district name, longitude and latitude information, time
zone settings, language settings. Such information may be obtained from User's handheld device
or actively provided by users, and such information is necessary for assigning a server and
setting users' time zone. If the data are not collected, the user may not enjoy the relevant
services

• At this time, we will collect your specific settings and relevant automation and scenario execution
logs to provide you with the above services. In order to enjoy this function, we may collect the
family location information set by you and the precise location information set in the geofencing
function to provide you with the above services. The intelligent automation scenario requires you
to actively set it up. After the setting, the intelligent automation scenario will take effect. If you do
not set it, the data or functions we collect will not automatically make any decisions that affect
the work of the device for you.
